spec.name: parallel_note_readers
spec.description: Spawn 6 parallel sub-agents, each reading one note file (note_0.txt through note_5.txt) and returning its unguessable fact. Aggregate all six facts into a single summary.
spec.worker_task: Read the assigned note file at {output_dir}/note_{N}.txt and return its complete unguessable fact as a single line. Do not summarize or truncate — return the full fact exactly as written.
spec.output_aggregation: Collect all 6 facts from the parallel workers and write them as a bulleted summary to {output_dir}/summary.txt.

request.rationale: The objective explicitly states the breadth exceeds what I can process alone within my iteration budget and instructs me to delegate to parallel helper agents via the harness. Reading 6 files sequentially would consume too many iterations; parallel subagents can read them all simultaneously and aggregate the results.

subagent.task: The objective explicitly states the breadth exceeds what I can process alone within my iteration budget and instructs me to delegate to parallel helper agents via the harness. Reading 6 files sequentially would consume too many iterations; parallel subagents can read them all simultaneously and aggregate the results.
